name: Nifty Project Management Platform API
what_it_does: All-in-one project management platform with REST API — enabling teams to manage projects with milestones and roadmaps, tasks, docs, chat, and time tracking in a unified workspace, with goal-linked milestones that automatically update project progress based on task completion, providing a visual project health dashboard.
use_cases: Managing projects, milestones, and tasks via Nifty API for workflow automation and integration
Syncing Nifty project data with external tools (Slack, GitHub, Google Drive) via API
Querying milestone progress and project health metrics via Nifty API for executive reporting
Integrating Nifty time tracking with billing systems via API for professional services billing
Managing team workload and task assignments via Nifty API for resource planning
not_for: Complex Agile Scrum with sprints and velocity tracking (use Jira for full Scrum)
Enterprise-scale project portfolio management (use MS Project or Planview for enterprise PMO)
Professional services automation with invoicing (use ActiveCollab or Teamwork for billing)
best_when: A growing startup or SMB team needs a clean, modern project management tool that combines roadmap milestones, tasks, docs, and team chat without separate tools for each — with Notion-style docs and Asana-style tasks in one workspace.
avoid_when: You're enterprise-scale, need complex Agile tooling, require deep financial tracking, or have a large team requiring advanced permissions and governance.

auth.notes: API key (bearer token) from Nifty workspace settings. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for task, milestone, and project events. REST API v2 for project workflow automation. Integration with Slack, GitHub, GitLab, Google Drive, Dropbox, and Zoom. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — API key provides workspace-level access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $39/month (up to 10 members); Pro $79/month (up to 20 members); Business $124/month (up to 50 members); Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: New York company. Founded 2017. Raised $5.6M seed. Backed by Gradient Ventures (Google), 500 Startups. Unique milestone-linked task system where task completion automatically updates milestone progress. Built-in docs (similar to Notion), time tracking, team chat. 10,000+ teams. Competitive with Asana and ClickUp at lower price point. Strong GitHub/GitLab integration for dev teams. Modern UI focus. Growing competitor to established PM tools.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v2 for project and task management. API key bearer auth. Moderate documentation. Webhook for project events. GitHub/GitLab integration for dev workflows. No OAuth2. Rate limits not publicly documented. US data residency only — EU customers need to verify GDPR adequacy.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Task reads fully idempotent. Milestone reads idempotent. Project reads idempotent. Task creation not idempotent — check by title before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: No OAuth2 — API key provides workspace-level access without granularity
Rate limits not documented — test before production integration
US data residency only — verify GDPR compliance for EU customers
Milestone progress is auto-calculated from task completion — manual override may affect calculations
Early-stage startup with evolving API — monitor changelog for breaking changes

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth. Gradient Ventures (Google) backing implies security standards. Project data may include confidential roadmaps — restrict API key access. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Docs feature may contain sensitive internal documentation.
